market_context: Market sentiment on X/Twitter is cautiously optimistic, with many users discussing potential Fed rate cut signals and strong tech earnings. Pre-market futures for S&P 500 and Nasdaq are up slightly by 0.3% and 0.4% respectively, while notable movers include tech giants like NVDA with positive buzz. Major news includes a scheduled Fed speech at 2 PM ET, which could impact market direction.

predictions.reasoning: Positive pre-market futures for S&P 500 up 0.3% suggest upward momentum. X/Twitter sentiment is leaning bullish with discussions around potential Fed dovishness. Upcoming Fed speech could reinforce this if tone remains accommodative.

NVDA is seeing strong pre-market activity with a 1.2% gain based on web data from Yahoo Finance. X/Twitter posts highlight excitement over recent AI product announcements, driving positive sentiment. Options flow shows heavy call buying for April expiries per web reports.

X/Twitter sentiment for TSLA is mixed, with concerns over delivery numbers reported weaker than expected per web news from Bloomberg. Short interest data from web sources indicates a slight uptick, suggesting bearish pressure. Pre-market trading shows a slight dip of 0.5%.
